title: gentiana froelichii subsp. zenariae
intro: Gentiana froelichii subsp. zenariae, also known as the Tibetan gentian, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family, characterized by its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The Tibetan gentian has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Research has shown that this plant has health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and possessing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the Tibetan gentian is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
